Class Builder

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Abstract.Card
it.polimi.Game.Elements.Tribe
it.polimi.Abstract.Character
it.polimi.Characters.Builder
public class Builder extends Character
Represents a Builder character in the game. Builders are specialized characters that provide resource discounts for constructing buildings and award prestige points to the player.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Builder(Era era, int players, int discount, int points)
    Constructs a Builder character with the specified properties.

  • Method Summary

    Method
    Description
    int
    getDiscount()
    Returns the resource discount granted by this Builder for constructing buildings.
    int
    getPoints()
    Returns the prestige points granted by this Builder to the player's total.

    getPrestigePoints()
    Returns the prestige points generated by this Builder.

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder(Era era, int players, int discount, int points)
      Constructs a Builder character with the specified properties.
      Parameters:
      era - the era during which this character is available
      players - the minimum number of players required for this character to be in the deck
      discount - the amount of resource discount provided for building construction
      points - the prestige points awarded by this character

  • Method Details

    • getDiscount

      public int getDiscount()
      Returns the resource discount granted by this Builder for constructing buildings.
      Returns:
      the building discount value

    • getPoints

      public int getPoints()
      Returns the prestige points granted by this Builder to the player's total.
      Returns:
      the number of prestige points

    • getPrestigePoints

      public int getPrestigePoints()
      Returns the prestige points generated by this Builder. This implementation returns the points value specific to the Builder.
      Overrides:
      getPrestigePoints in class Character
      Returns:
      The prestige points.
